Lines.FullText: A module is an object that provides device and function block factories.

Elements.RawText: A module is an object that provides device and function block factories.

Lines.FullText: The object is usually implemented in an external dynamic link / shared library.

Elements.RawText: The object is usually implemented in an external dynamic link / shared library.

Lines.FullText: IModuleManager is responsible for loading all modules.

Elements.RawText: IModuleManager is responsible for loading all modules.

Brief.RawText:
*  @brief A module is an object that provides device and function block factories.
 *  The object is usually implemented in an external dynamic link / shared library.
 *  IModuleManager is responsible for loading all modules.
